title: Nature's Compass: Explorer's Edition
description: Allows you to locate biomes anywhere in the world—a more immersive version of a more immersive version of the original Nature's Compass.
body:
![Header Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/110f0c3a7e8d7d38834637dee4154847fd3ec32f.png)

Nature's Compass is an item that allows you to search for a biome's location anywhere in the world. Nature's Compass: Explorer's Edition is a modified version of a [modified version](https://modrinth.com/mod/natures-compass-immersive) of Chaosyr's [original mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/natures-compass): Instead of choosing the biome in a GUI or in the cartography table, you have to calibrate the compass using items from the biome you want the compass to point to. 

_Note that this deviates from other versions of this mod in that you generally first have to find a biome yourself. You can then use the compass to find the same biome elsewhere or share a calibrated compass with your friends to help them out!_

## Features

Right-clicking a cartography table with the Nature's Compass opens the Biome Table, which allows you to calibrate the compass to a biome of your choice.
- Pre-calibrated compasses can be found in dungeons to help you find rarer biomes. _(Can be disabled in the config)._
- The compass always points to the current closest occurrence of a biome, not just to the closest biome at time of calibration.
- When the compass is not pointing at a biome, it will point at the world spawn.
- Support for modded biomes can also be added through the config: Simply define what items calibrate the compass to each new biome!
- Includes integrations for JEI and EMI.

## Gallery
![Calibrating the compass](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b318f24665d1bb2f8645702c93fcf6caf4664b10_0.webp)
_Calibrating the compass using biome-specific items._

![Compass found in a desert temple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d20bbe5fd464e847b8175d07ac59639dd8024096.png)
_A precalibrated compass in a desert temple._

![JEI integration](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/167851d6e92e4e69e7605c76ad6e3be0f99bb69e.png)
_Calibration recipes are shown in JEI._

![The crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d25445c542d536b419fcc64ccb9e04e7f31f6030.png)

_The crafting recipe._


## Modpacks
Yes, you can use this mod in your modpack.

## Credits
Based on Chaosyr's original [Nature's Compass](https://modrinth.com/mod/natures-compass). Check it out!
